Jupiter sends supportive energy your way, easing progress and opening doors from Jan–Apr.

leo.snippet: Saturn enters Leo in Aug, calling for discipline, commitment, and long-term building — foundations laid now last. Neptune lifts creative and spiritual life with gentle inspiration and intuitive ease throughout 2034. Jupiter sends supportive energy your way, easing progress and opening doors from Apr–Dec.

virgo.snippet: Uranus opens small windows of innovation and creative departure from routine throughout 2034. Saturn supports careful planning and incremental progress in practical areas of life from Jan–Aug. Jupiter reflects growth back through your closest partnerships and key relationships from Jan–Apr.

libra.snippet: Pluto supports deep, lasting change that emerges from a place of readiness rather than crisis throughout 2034. Saturn supports careful planning and incremental progress in practical areas of life from Aug–Dec. Neptune blurs the line between self and other this year — clarity in close relationships takes conscious effort throughout 2034.

scorpio.snippet: Uranus brings exciting breakthroughs and room to experiment without destabilising your core throughout 2034. Saturn rewards consistent effort and steady systems with tangible, lasting results from Jan–Aug. Jupiter sends supportive energy your way, easing progress and opening doors from Jan–Apr.

sagittarius.snippet: Neptune lifts creative and spiritual life with gentle inspiration and intuitive ease throughout 2034. Jupiter sends supportive energy your way, easing progress and opening doors from Apr–Dec. Saturn rewards consistent effort and steady systems with tangible, lasting results from Aug–Dec.

capricorn.snippet: Jupiter offers quiet opportunity where effort is rewarded more readily than usual from Jan–Apr. Uranus shakes up partnerships and key relationships with sudden realisations or unexpected reversals throughout 2034. Saturn asks for a recalibration of responsibilities — what you commit to now shapes the years ahead from Aug–Dec.

aquarius.snippet: Pluto moves through Aquarius for all of 2034, moving through a long arc of deep transformation and power reclamation — nothing stays the same. Neptune adds a quiet poetic quality to intuition, creativity, and inner reflection throughout 2034. Jupiter offers quiet opportunity where effort is rewarded more readily than usual from Apr–Dec.

pisces.snippet: Jupiter completes its time in Pisces in Apr — a cycle that began years ago now closes, leaving lasting change in its wake. Uranus brings exciting breakthroughs and room to experiment without destabilising your core throughout 2034. Saturn rewards consistent effort and steady systems with tangible, lasting results from Jan–Aug.
